completedItems: Polished the chat header date control with an accessible current-date label, selected-date state, Escape dismissal, and focus-out menu closing.

Kept available date groups derived locally from the bounded Convex-backed `listMessages` result and corrected grouping to use local calendar dates instead of UTC slices, matching the displayed date labels.

Improved date selection behavior to scroll directly to the first message for the selected day, avoiding sticky divider overlap, and added a short non-layout highlight animation so the jump feels stable without flicker/pop-in.
Preserved reply-to behavior after jumping by leaving message rows and reply controls mounted in chronological history, including older seeded messages.
Committed changes as `47934c2 feat(chat): polish date navigation dropdown`.
unfinishedItems: Manual browser validation of seeded Convex wipe/seed workflow, hover states, and perceived scroll smoothness was not performed in this worker session.
Repository still has a pre-existing modified `.DS_Store` file that was not touched or committed.

issuesDiscovered: Impeccable project context files are absent, so UI polish followed existing implementation style rather than documented product/design context.
Lint has existing warnings in generated Convex files about unused eslint-disable directives, but no lint errors after formatting.

validationAssertionsTouched.notes: Header date button displays the active viewport/date context and updates from scroll or selected date.
Dropdown lists grouped dates with message counts from the bounded Convex-backed message query data.
Selecting a date closes the menu and smoothly scrolls to the first message for that day.
Jump uses scrollIntoView plus box-shadow-only highlight animation, avoiding remounts or layout animation. Manual seeded visual validation still recommended.
Older day messages remain normal message rows with existing reply buttons after date jumps, allowing reply target selection and composer send.
